Lefts

Rights
I none
C C-7n length 1
AND 03-7 72-6 length 2

OR-NOT 62-7n length 1

Left longest: 7
Right longest: 2

Left winner: I none, C none, AND win, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I none, C lost, AND win, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT lost

Longest Left: AND 15-0 26-1 37-2 40-3 51-4 62-5 73-6
Longest Right: AND 03-7 72-6

7 + 2 = 9 > 8
Right will be truncated to length 8 - 7 = 1

Truncated left: AND 15-0 26-1 37-2 40-3 51-4 62-5 73-6
Truncated right: AND 03-7 truncated

0 AND 15
1 AND 26
2 AND 37
3 AND 40
4 AND 51
5 AND 62
6 AND 73
7 AND 03

Applying to 11001001
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND 15 = AND(I 1,I 5) = AND(1,0) = 0
1 AND 26 = AND(I 2,I 6) = AND(0,0) = 0
2 AND 37 = AND(I 3,I 7) = AND(0,1) = 0
3 AND 40 = AND(I 4,I 0) = AND(1,1) = 1
4 AND 51 = AND(I 5,I 1) = AND(0,1) = 0
5 AND 62 = AND(I 6,I 2) = AND(0,0) = 0
6 AND 73 = AND(I 7,I 3) = AND(1,0) = 0
7 AND 03 = AND(I 0,I 3) = AND(1,0) = 0

\boxed{00010000}
